name: Standard Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the basil, garlic, pine nuts, and 1/2 teaspoon salt to a food processor.
2. Pulse until the ingredients form a paste.
3. Add the Parmesan cheese and pulse again until thoroughly blended.
4. With the machine running slowly, add the olive oil.
5. Adjust the seasonings as desired.
6. Transfer the pesto to a bowl.
Yield: 1 generous cup
